source.title: PDD Holdings ROIC and Capital Allocation Analysis

extractions.claim: PDD Holdings generates extraordinarily high ROIC of 70-78% annualized, far exceeding its 10.5% WACC, indicating every dollar retained creates substantial value
extractions.evidence: PDD Holdings' annualized ROIC for the quarter ended June 2025 was 78.08%. TTM ROIC is 70.85%. WACC is 10.54%. Using a more conservative methodology (Stock Analysis), ROIC is 16.74% and ROE is 30.53%. The wide variation reflects whether cash/investments are included in invested capital.

verification.verifier_notes: Multiple sources confirm ROIC well above WACC. Conservative estimate (16.7%) still 1.6x WACC. High-end (78%) reflects asset-light platform model with minimal tangible invested capital.

extractions.claim: PDD has grown FCF from $6.9B (2022) to $13.2B (2023) to $16.6B (2024), demonstrating compounding capital efficiency
extractions.evidence: PDD Holdings annual FCF: 2023 was $13.18B (+89.9% YoY), 2024 was $16.572B (+25.73% YoY). TTM FCF as of Sept 2025 was $15.623B. 5-year average FCF/share growth rate was 42.3%/year.

verification.verifier_notes: FCF figures from MacroTrends and GuruFocus. TTM slight decline reflects heavy investment cycle in 2025.

extractions.claim: PDD's retained earnings have created massive market value — the Buffett $1 test is easily passed over the 2020-2024 period
extractions.evidence: Revenue grew from ~$6B (2020) to $54B (2024). Operating income went from near-zero to ~$12-13B. Cash pile grew from ~$10B to $60B. Market cap, despite massive drawdown from peak, remains at ~$75-85B range. Cumulative retained earnings over FY2020-2024 easily exceed $30B while creating substantial enterprise value.

verification.verifier_notes: Approximate calculation based on cumulative net income and market cap changes. Exact retained earnings figure requires full balance sheet analysis. Market cap has declined from $200B+ peak, so the calculation is period-dependent.
